entries.definition:
th–j–j downpour, to flow forcefully, to gush out, to flood,
waterfalls. Of this root, ثَجَّاجًا thajjājan occurs once in the Qur’an.

ثَجَّاجًا thajjājan [intens. act. part.] pouring forth, cascading
(78:14) وَأَنْزَلْنَا مِنَ الْمُعْصِرَاتِ مَاءً ثَجَّاجًا and We send down from
rain-carrying clouds (or, by means of rain-causing winds)
cascading water.
